---
title: "Betsy's Stats Cookbook"
listing:
  id: tasks
  contents: tasks
  type: table
  sort: "title"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [title, description, categories]
---

A cookbook of applied-statistics code snippets accumulated while completing
coursework for an applied-statistics degree. Each **task** is its own page,
tagged with the **course** it came from *and* with cross-cutting **concept
tags** (Model Fitting, Diagnostics, Visualization, …), so the same content is
browsable by course and by concept — and fully searchable.

Use the category tags to the right to filter by course or by concept, or the
search box (top right) to find a specific technique.

*Organized using Claude Code*

::: {#tasks}
:::
